ops.body: Progress 2026-07-17: DONE except the deferred trio. cc-skills f9623cef (mcp-base/mcp-swift guides + repo-bootstrap layout FileSpecs, plugin 0.55.0, CI green). 38 repos wired+shipped+CI-green (37 lock-bearing incl. authkit/crm/semisweet + daily); fusekit-f3 hand-cleaned (no git). Settings remnants: zero fleet-wide (daily fixed, task a2754a4 closed). Stale semble guide prose purged in 10 repos (span delete + cc-skills:ccx import + semble.search->ccx swaps + orphan LSP/Grep block removal), all CI green. Cross-model verify: deterministic sweep + independent sonnet enumeration agree — remaining semble = cookie-sync/.mcp.json + yasyf.com (.mcp.json + unmigrated prose), both parked trees, rerun recipe in task 27c8cc0. Memory overclaim corrected in all 17 account copies. Criteria 1-2 pend on 27c8cc0; criteria 3-5 met.
